{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201725047611848535CD74E93135"}"},"total":2789},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7260130006742713147","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书可以说是狠狠地震惊到我了，原本以为这只是一本普通的幕后流无脑文，但在看到第三卷以及第四卷开端时，堪称惊异的伏笔和一步步逐渐完整的世界线着实让我惊叹了一下作者的笔力，应该可以说是番茄的一股清流了，至少在同类型第四天灾类型是的，我这几天就知道靠这一本书拉回了我在番茄看书的欲望，可能是厌书期到了吧[笑哭]，总而言之，至少在第四卷以及前几卷中是没什么毒点的，反正我是完全可以享受，主角的性格也非圣母，略显滑稽[奸笑]，思维缜密，注意本书无女主，脑洞很开，不负五星！（个人意见，不喜勿喷，异议评论↓）","text_exts":[{"e":110,"s":106,"text":"第四天灾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399870474E93135%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227260130006742713147%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227114081528371481600%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%AC%AC%E5%9B%9B%E5%A4%A9%E7%81%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1690380844,"group_id":"7114081528371481600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"沉淀，沉淀，再沉淀！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9mBhEYH0xqWE+PhZcljvTnMi9OgeAjmg1P3qCHjydo0","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/64a3ffb8bab843b9a6f97681d2d4276a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776529616&x-signature=qzpx6PWLv9LyYyov51EMY6UtH4Y%3D","user_id":"1733308095922856","user_name":"猫带帽子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1733308095922856","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7114081528371481600","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾 + 玩家召唤 + 群像 + 欢乐 + 脑洞 + 异世界】
崇尚暴力和杀戮的军团拒绝发起战争，奴隶起义创立的帝国继续推行奴隶制，信奉和仰仗神明的部落闭口不谈他们的神，仿生机器开辟的国度一味讲究人权。
那么，按照这个逻辑来看，全能的神没有任何能力，似乎也不是不能接受？
……
沈明看着眼前充满期待的玩家们：“现在，你们可以说出自己想要的能力了。”
“任何能力？”
“任何能力，只要是你所想的，都可以成为现实。”
“卧槽，这跟我想的不一样啊，什么程序架构能这么玩
……
这是一款超现实的虚拟游戏，开发商觉得玩家们不太正经，而玩家们却觉得这个开发商太不正经。
书名《恩赐的游戏》，其他名称均为推广名～","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/23cb9114dc0de00c83b85b955841b647","author":"一月九十秋","author_id":"","book_id":"7114081528371481600","book_name":"第四天灾：我的玩家可以自创技能","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7114087172517003807","read_count":"38006","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1671485"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"684","tags":"游戏体育,系统,穿越,第四天灾,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/590940a993649be5a0051a8d1e42d95a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779182704&x-signature=6BLYFYr8DZDqAWnhclwQIx6fVTU%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"321510680310493","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5.3018187e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201725047611848535CD74E93135"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读15小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":71,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":53017,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":48427},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7124445272922784527","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很不错的一本小说，作者的文笔不错，思路也很新颖，海克斯选的应该是思路清晰，多线程故事齐发展，并且描写的也不错，三路优势，就是更新速度不行，刷野刷的太慢了，一天不更个几十个章说不过去。
害怕的就是作者中期乏力，打不出优势，然后后期血崩，导致烂尾。
又或者是写不下去直接太监，所以希望作者能够稳定发展，促进作者与读者之间的良好和平关系稳定增长。","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":24,"text":"海克斯","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%B5%B7%E5%85%8B%E6%96%AF&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177399870474E93135%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227124445272922784527%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227114081528371481600%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%B5%B7%E5%85%8B%E6%96%AF%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1658789261,"group_id":"7114081528371481600","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"小说，不能只看名字","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0So1I2wjuUUcr9/FsiZKoUJDepFhCJYZkZzJvIjTDj8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f077c61be3aa4200bd958fae2e9536f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776531431&x-signature=rciOZwys5yV%2Fur5GApopcoJ%2F3Mk%3D","user_id":"1653298604541613","user_name":"陆陆永远三岁"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1653298604541613","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7114081528371481600","book_info":{"abstract":"【第四天灾 + 玩家召唤 + 群像 + 欢乐 + 脑洞 + 异世界】
